data.body: OWNER DECISION on 664 era-anchor: do NOT decide now; add it to the escalation for the stronger model to resolve in its revised design. Producing an escalation ADDENDUM. 664's material-half fix stays (authoritative recompute + gated-history); the era-anchor half is now formally part of the escalated authoritative-state/key-rotation design. Delivered-half closing work complete: 368c/42d1/e4df CLOSED + green (649/650/660). 4214 (664) joins ee0b/8f1d escalation. Nothing further to close autonomously.
